title: malacothrix saxatilis var. altissima
intro: Malacothrix saxatilis var. altissima, also known as the tall bush dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Western North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Malacothrix saxatilis var. altissima include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
